n: Foreword -- Book 2: Echoes in the Dark

steps.t: Bennt Sharp-eye is in the Dolven-view, far to the east of Durin's Threshold, in the Great Delving. Stíling is in the Deep Descent, among the Silvertin…
Bósi has established a command centre somewhere within Moria and is waiting to speak with you there. The Dwarves of Moria will be able to guide you to…
